title: Important Documents Checklist
summary: Locating and organizing the documents that matter most, before they're needed urgently.

tasks.title: Locate power of attorney (financial and medical)
tasks.jurisdictionNote: POA rules vary by state — confirm validity with an elder law attorney if unsure.

tasks.title: Locate a will or trust, if one exists
Locate an advance directive or living will
List all bank and investment accounts
tasks.explanation: Institution, account type, roughly where statements are kept.

tasks.title: List insurance policies
tasks.explanation: Life, health, long-term care, home, auto.
tasks.documents: Policy numbers and insurer contact info.

tasks.title: Note where tax returns from recent years are kept
tasks.documents: Past 2–3 years of returns, if accessible.

tasks.title: Locate Social Security card and number
tasks.documents: SSN card or number recorded securely.

tasks.title: List current medications, doctors, and diagnoses
Note the location of a safe deposit box or home safe, if any
tasks.who: Bank, if a safe deposit box exists.
